summary.work_completed: FR-SCENE-001 implementation verified complete on main. Scene3D.tsx replaces stub with full R3F Canvas (lighting, Grid, OrbitControls with LEFT freed for brick placement). WebGL error handler registered in main.tsx. All 3 test IDs implemented in Scene3D.test.tsx and merged via PR #45.
key_findings: Implementation was already complete from scaffolding (PR #6) — no stub replacement needed
OrbitControls configured with mouseButtons={{ LEFT: undefined }} to free LEFT for brick placement
Global WebGL error handler (window.__legoBuilderErrors) registered in main.tsx for KR-1.3
All 3 test IDs (T-FE-SCENE-001-01, T-FE-SCENE-001-02, T-FE-SCENE-001-03) implemented and merged via PR #45
Geometry disposal on unmount implemented in InstancedBricks to prevent WebGL memory leaks

recommended_actions: Review PR #45 (already merged) for Scene3D implementation and test quality
Verify Scene3D.tsx has correct OrbitControls mouseButtons={{ LEFT: undefined }} configuration
Verify main.tsx has window.__legoBuilderErrors global error handler
Confirm T-FE-SCENE-001-01, T-FE-SCENE-001-02, T-FE-SCENE-001-03 pass in CI
Check that GridPlane uses ThreeEvent (not DOM PointerEvent) for brick placement
